title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `plexus/scores/composite/GoogleGemini.py`
**Location:** line 315, column 34 to line 315, column 45
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/scores/composite/GoogleGemini.py:313-317)
```
 313 |     def construct_element_prompt(self, *, prompt, transcript):
 314 | 
 315 |         system_prompt_template = Environment().from_string(prompt)
 316 |         prompt = system_prompt_template.render(transcript=transcript)
 317 | 
```

**Issue Key:** 6eb34234-21f7-4d62-89fd-e77149eff0d3

### Details
Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
